raw_entries.text: Match ends, Czechia 0, Mexico 3.
Second Half ends, Czechia 0, Mexico 3.
Attempt saved. Santiago Giménez (Mexico) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Matej Kovár (Czechia). Assisted by Roberto Alvarado.
Goal! Czechia 0, Mexico 3. Álvaro Fidalgo (Mexico) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Roberto Alvarado.
Attempt missed. David Doudera (Czechia) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Alexandr Sojka with a cross.
Attempt missed. Pavel Sulc (Czechia) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left.
Foul by Obed Vargas (Mexico).
